items.definition_en: A broom is a tool for sweeping floors.
items.example_en: She used a broom to clean the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A mop is used for washing floors.
items.example_en: He grabbed the mop to clean up the spill.

items.definition_en: A bucket is a container for holding water.
items.example_en: She filled the bucket with soapy water.

items.definition_en: A dustpan collects dirt swept from the floor.
items.example_en: Use the dustpan to pick up the crumbs.

items.definition_en: A vacuum cleaner is a machine for cleaning carpets.
items.example_en: The vacuum cleaner is in the closet.

items.definition_en: A sponge is used for washing and cleaning.
items.example_en: He wiped the counter with a sponge.

items.definition_en: A cleaning cloth is used to wipe surfaces.
items.example_en: She always keeps a cleaning cloth in the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A disinfectant kills germs on surfaces.
items.example_en: He sprayed disinfectant on the bathroom sink.

items.definition_en: Washing powder is used to clean clothes.
items.example_en: She added washing powder to the laundry.

items.definition_en: Bleach is a strong liquid for cleaning and whitening.
items.example_en: He used bleach to clean the tiles.

items.definition_en: A floor cleaner is a liquid for washing floors.
items.example_en: She poured some floor cleaner into the bucket.

items.definition_en: A scrubbing brush is a stiff brush for cleaning.
items.example_en: He used a scrubbing brush to clean the bath.

items.definition_en: A scouring pad is used to scrub tough stains.
items.example_en: She cleaned the pots with a scouring pad.

items.definition_en: Rubber gloves protect hands while cleaning.
items.example_en: He wore rubber gloves to wash the dishes.

items.definition_en: Window cleaner is a liquid for cleaning glass.
items.example_en: She sprayed window cleaner on the glass.

items.definition_en: A feather duster removes dust from surfaces.
items.example_en: He used a feather duster on the shelves.

items.definition_en: A waste bin is used for throwing away rubbish.
items.example_en: He emptied the waste bin every day.

items.definition_en: Dish soap is a liquid for washing dishes.
items.example_en: She poured dish soap into the sink.

items.definition_en: Fabric softener is added to laundry for softness.
items.example_en: He always uses fabric softener for his clothes.

items.definition_en: A squeegee is a tool for cleaning windows.
items.example_en: She cleaned the window with a squeegee.
